Findings.Title: Branch-Protection score 4/10
Findings.Detail: OSSF Scorecard reports default branch lacks required reviews and signed-commit enforcement.
Findings.Remediation: Enable required reviewers and signed-commits on default branch.

Findings.Title: Token-Permissions score 0/10
Findings.Detail: Workflows use default GITHUB_TOKEN with write-all permissions.
Findings.Remediation: Add 'permissions: contents: read' at workflow root and elevate per-job.

Findings.Title: Pinned-Dependencies score 9/10
Findings.Detail: 97% of GH Actions dependencies pinned by SHA.
